data.title: Survey by TaxSlayer and Talker Research shows 2/3 Americans anticipate personal tax impact in 2026, many uncertain.
data.description: In Augusta, Georgia on January 26, 2026, a recent national survey conducted by Talker Research for TaxSlayer indicates that despite awareness of major tax reforms this year, many Americans are uncertain about the potential impact on them. Out of those surveyed, 46% expressed...

data.title: Tradespace secures $15M Series A led by AVP to streamline IP law, enabling 50% cost reduction and filing patents in under 24 hours.
data.description: A recent funding round of $15 million led by AVP has enabled enterprises to bring IP development and management in-house, resulting in a 50% reduction in legal expenses. This move allows for rapid patent filings within 24 hours, underscoring the company's commitment to innovation and efficiency. The investment aims to support the company's expansion plans and facilitate the streamlining of patent processes for businesses.

data.title: OZOP Energy Solutions, Inc. highlights leadership of Varon Corp by Founder and CEO Benjamin Varon Schubert.
data.description: OZOP Energy Solutions, Inc., a leading provider of energy solutions and growth platforms, emphasized the leadership of Varon Corp in Warwick, NY on Jan. 26, 2026. Varon Corp, headed by Founder and CEO Benjamin Varon Schubert, is known for its innovative energy solutions. OZOP Energy Solutions, Inc. trades under the symbol OZSCD on the OTC market.

data.title: AB Akola Group may invest EUR 34 million in new plant in Kaišiadorys for animal by-products processing.
data.description: AB Akola Group, a major agricultural and food production conglomerate in the Baltics, is exploring the possibility of carrying out an investment initiative in Kaišiadorys involving the enhancement of infrastructure for handling animal by-products. The proposed investment is expected to amount to around EUR 34 million and would be facilitated through its subsidiary Vilniaus Paukštynas.

data.title: FilterLabs extends partnership with Australia's Development Intelligence Lab for second phase of collaboration.
data.description: FilterLabs has recently revealed a new stage in their collaboration with Development Intelligence Lab, a research and analysis organization headquartered in Australia.

data.title: Offerpad will announce its Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 23, 2026, in Tempe, Arizona.
data.description: Offerpad, a company based in Tempe, Arizona, has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 23rd. This announcement signifies an important update for stakeholders and investors regarding the company's performance during that period. Stakeholders can expect to receive detailed information about Offerpad's financial health, including key figures such as revenue, earnings, and possibly future outlook. This disclosure is crucial for assessing the company's progress and strategic direction over the specified period.

data.title: Planet Labs Germany has signed an enterprise agreement with the Slovenian government to provide satellite data for agriculture, urban planning, and disaster management.
data.description: Planet Labs Germany GmbH, a prominent supplier of daily information and analysis regarding global transformations, has revealed a substantial agreement with the Surveying and Mapping Authority of the Republic of Slovenia (GURS). The pact aims to deliver extensive satellite data and advanced tasking features throughout Slovenia’s civil public sector. This collaboration forms a consolidated spatial data platform for state and municipal entities in Slovenia. The contract size and specific terms were not disclosed publicly.

data.title: UnitedHealth Group to release earnings on 2026-01-27 with projected EPS of $2.10. Stock at $356.26, down 34.33% in 52 weeks. Analysts predict 14.17% upside potential with 7 Outperform ratings.
data.description: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, 2026-01-27, with analysts expecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.10. Investors are eager for news on surpassing estimates and guidance for the next quarter, as past performance has shown mixed outcomes with price drops despite positive earnings reports. The stock is currently trading at $356.26, down 34.33% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given UnitedHealth Group an overall Outperform rating, with an average price target of $404.71, indicating a 14.17% potential upside. This news highlights the significance of guidance and market sentiments for stock price movements.

data.title: UPS to report EPS of $2.21 on 2026-01-27. Past earnings exceeded estimates. Shares at $107.98, down 20.26% in 52 weeks. Analysts give UPS a consensus Buy rating.
data.description: United Parcel Service (UPS) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2026-01-27, with analysts expecting an EPS of $2.21. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that surpass estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous earnings release, UPS beat EPS by $0.43, resulting in a 1.08% increase in share price. Over the last 52 weeks, UPS shares are down 20.26%, causing concern for long-term shareholders. Analysts have given UPS a consensus rating of Buy, with 15 total ratings. The current share price is $107.98. Stay updated for more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Texas Instruments to release earnings on 2026-01-27, expected EPS $1.31. Recent history has EPS misses, causing price drops. Shares at $193.31. Neutral rating, price target $192.2.
data.description: Texas Instruments (TXN) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on January 27, 2026. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.31. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that surpass estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. Guidance is important as it can impact stock movements. In the last quarter, TXN reported an EPS miss of $0.00, leading to a 5.6% drop in share price the next day. Texas Instruments shares were trading at $193.31 on January 23, showing a 7.06% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have a neutral rating on TXN, with an average one-year price target of $192.20 suggesting a potential 1.43% downside. Peer ratings overview and further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: RTX set to report EPS of $1.47 on 2026-01-27. Past performance shows potential impact on share prices. Analysts rate RTX as Buy with target price of $209.25.
data.description: RTX (NYSE: RTX) is set to report its quarterly earnings on Tuesday with analysts predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.47. Investors are hopeful for positive news and guidance for the next quarter, as stock prices can be influenced by future projections. In the last quarter, RTX beat EPS estimates by $0.29, resulting in a 2.85% increase in share price the following day. The company has shown consistent growth with previous earnings beats. Currently, shares of RTX are trading at $195.93, up 52.65% in the last 52 weeks. Analysts have a consensus rating of Buy on RTX, with an average one-year price target of $209.25, indicating a potential 6.58% upside. Investors are optimistic about the company's performance leading up to the earnings release.

data.title: 2026 Axxess report shows 60% care at home leaders lack investment in AI. On the rise for future growth.
data.description: In Dallas, a report released on Jan. 26, 2026, highlights the crucial role artificial intelligence (AI) is projected to have in the future of home care. Surprisingly, despite this potential, the majority of organizations have not made investments in this technology, as revealed in the 2026 Axxess Industry Growth Insights Report. It states that 60% of leaders in the care at home sector have yet to allocate resources towards AI implementation. This indicates a significant gap in leveraging AI advancements within the industry.

data.title: Solo expands platform with Solo Studio for home energy contractors; secures 2 U.S. patents; Jan. 26, 2026 LEHI, Utah - PRNewswire.
data.description: A leading proposal management platform for home energy contractors, Solo, has unveiled Solo Studio - a new self-serve design platform granting contractors exceptional control over proposals. Set in LEHI, Utah, on Jan. 26, 2026, the company has also successfully obtained two U.S. patents for its innovative proposal technology. This advancement marks a significant milestone for Solo as it continues to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: Republic Services named one of the World's Most Admired Companies for the fifth time by Fortune. NYSE: RSG. Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: PHOENIX - Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has once again been honored for its exceptional social responsibility, innovation, and quality of management. This marks the fifth time the company has been recognized as one of the World's Most Admired Companies by Fortune. Republic Services, Inc. has been highly praised for its commitment to social responsibility and innovation.

data.title: Ricursive Intelligence secures $300M Series A at $4B valuation for AI semiconductor design, led by Lightspeed Venture.
data.description: Ricursive Intelligence, an AI lab established by co-creators, secured significant funding led by Lightspeed Venture Partners within just under two months of its launch, in addition to backing from DST Global, NVentures, Radical, Felicis, 49 Palms, Sequoia, and other investors. The company, based in PALO ALTO, Calif., made this announcement on Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: Portland artist Brandon Carmody releases 50-song retrospective spanning 40 years of career. Jan. 26, 2026. Website, social media, and streaming platforms available.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on January 26, 2026, actor and musician Brandon Carmody has launched "The Cutting Room Floor", a remarkable collection of 50 songs that encapsulate his 40-year artistic journey. The compilation showcases his diverse talents and highlights his evolution as a creative individual. The release is set to resonate with fans across various platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Amazon, Apple Music, Spotify, TikTok, and YouTube.
